message:
Security + resilience hardening across 37 source modules

ExfiltrationSentinel (lineage_tracker.rs): fix zone boundary matching
to use exact match + prefix comparison (zone-* or zone/) instead of
substring contains(), preventing false positives where "internal"
matched "internal-staging" zone names. Applied consistently in
ExfiltrationSentinel methods and invariant module helpers.

Quarantine state machine (quarantine.rs): enforce state transition
guards — start_drain() now requires Enforced state, complete_drain()
requires Draining state, returning ERR_QUARANTINE_INVALID_TRANSITION
for violations. Adds ct_eq for hash comparisons.

Evidence ledger (evidence_ledger.rs): replace lock().expect() with
lock_recover() that gracefully recovers from mutex poisoning via
poisoned.into_inner(), emitting EVD-LEDGER-005 diagnostic. Eviction
uses saturating_sub for byte accounting.

Constant-time comparison expansion: additional ct_eq migrations in
policy_checkpoint.rs, quarantine.rs, fork_detection.rs, and other
modules for hash/digest comparisons.

Region ownership (region_ownership.rs): leadership election event
enrichment. Repair controller: repair plan validation improvements.
Staking governance: stake withdrawal sequencing. Control lane mapping:
lane assignment audit events. Epoch transition barrier: barrier
crossing validation. Marker stream: marker emission ordering.

Connector modules: crdt.rs, durable_claim_gate.rs, ecosystem_registry,
n_version_oracle, prestage_engine, rollout_state, trust_zone,
vef_policy_constraints — various constant-time, formatting, and
resilience improvements.

Tools: adversarial_resilience_metrics, compatibility_correctness,
migration_speed_failure, performance_hardening, safe_extension_onboarding
— metric collection hardening.

VEF: proof_scheduler, proof_service, receipt_chain — proof chain
validation and scheduling improvements.

Runtime: lockstep_harness — harness execution path expansion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
